title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person assistance with understanding and applying for Medicaid (Oregon Health Plan). Does not help with private insurance or insurance on the Federal Health Exchange. 1250 S 9th Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (547) 947-6045 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (547) 947-6045 Ariana Azamar [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Limited walk-ins available. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FLUORIDE VARNISH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
